title: In exercise of powers conferred by section 11 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act

(i) यह आदेश सू瀣म और लघु उ獸म犘 (एमएसई) के िलए साव榁जिनक 灹ापण नीित संशोधन आदेश, 2018 कहा जाएगा। (ii) यह सरकारी राजप灴 म犆 अपने 灹काशन क琉 ितिथ से 灹वृ牵 होगा। 2. पूरे सू瀣म और लघु उ獸म犘 (एमएसई) के िलए साव榁जिनक 灹ापण नीित आदेश, 2012 (िजसे इसम犆 इसके प玑ात उ猴 आदेश कहा गया है) म犆 जहां कह牷 भी आंकड़े और श瀑द ‘‘20 灹ितशत’’ है उसे ‘‘25 灹ितशत’’ के आंकड़े और श瀑द से 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा। 3. उ猴 आदेश के पैरा灡ाफ 4 के प玑ात िन玈िलिखत पैरा को जोड़ा जाएगा :- ‘‘4 क. मिहला猒 के 瀡वािम瀄व वाले सू瀣म और लघु उ獸म के िलए िवशेष 灹ावधान। सू瀣म और लघु उ獸म犘 से कुल वा琔षक खरीद म犆 से 25 灹ितशत के ल瀣य के अंदर मिहला猒 के 瀡वािम瀄व वाले सू瀣म और लघु उ獸म से खरीद के िलए 3 灹ितशत का ल瀣य िन琖द玗 琈कया जाएगा। [फा. सं. 21(22)/2018-एमए] राम मोहन िम炈ा, अपर सिचव और िवकास आयु榉त -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES ORDER New Delhi, the 9th November, 2018 S.O. 5670(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by section 11 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments to the Public Procurement Policy for the Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) Order, 2012 namely :— 1. (i) This Order may be called the Public Procurement Policy for Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) Amendment Order, 2018. (ii) This shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Throughout the Public Procurement Policy for Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) Order, 2012, (hereinafter referred to as the said Order), for the figures and word “20 per cent”, wherever they occur, the figures and word “25 per cent” shall be substituted. 3. After paragraph 4 of the said Order, the following paragraph shall be inserted, namely:- “4A. Special provision for Micro and Small Enterprise owned by women. Out of the total annual procurement from Micro and Small Enterprises, 3 per cent from within the 25 per cent target shall be earmarked for procurement from Micro and Small Enterprises owned by women. [F. No. 21(22)-2018-MA] RAM MOHAN MISHRA, Addl. Secy. & Development Commissioner Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
